patch.value: Npm publication is the only remaining release step. Local release gates, tarball artifact smoke, public GitHub pm install smoke, GitHub repository settings, and GitHub release v0.1.0 are complete. The actual npm publish attempt failed with ENEEDAUTH, and npm view still returns E404 for pm-changelog.
Publish pm-changelog to npm after registry authentication

The package is release-ready and npm publish dry-run succeeds, but the actual npm publish command cannot complete because this machine is not authenticated to the npm registry. Publication must be retried after npm login or an npm automation token is configured.

- npm whoami succeeds against https://registry.npmjs.org/.
- npm publish --access public completes for pm-changelog@0.1.0 or the next available release version.
- npm view pm-changelog version returns the published version.
- pm install npm:pm-changelog --project succeeds in a clean temporary pm project and pm changelog generate works from that install path.
Run npm whoami or npm publish --access public from /home/steve/container/pm-packages/pm-changelog.
pm-changelog is published publicly to npm and installable via pm install npm:pm-changelog --project.
npm publish --dry-run succeeds with the 25-file package payload, but npm publish --access public fails with ENEEDAUTH because the machine is not logged in to npm.

value.author: codex
value.text: npm publish --access public failed with ENEEDAUTH; dry-run succeeded and GitHub release v0.1.0 is published.

value.author: codex
value.text: author=codex,created_at=now,text=After npm auth is configured, rerun npm publish --access public and then verify pm install npm:pm-changelog --project in a clean temp folder.

value.author: codex
value.text: pm install does not accept a local .tgz path directly; npm-source smoke tests should npm install the tarball first and then install the extracted node_modules package into pm.

value.note: npm package metadata and publish payload source
